instructionsForMarketing: Edit slotNumber, label, shortLabel, description, estimatedValue, weight, and color as needed.
Keep id stable after launch if reports or redemption tracking may reference that reward.
totalSlots must match the number of items in slots.
weight controls odds. Equal weights mean equal chance. Higher weight means more common.
Use shortLabel for wheel segments and label/description for the winner result.
